# Results

## Model Performance Comparison

```{python}
#| label: performance-table

# Summary table: Model × Metric (Accuracy, F1, AUC, Recall)
# Per group comparison (early detection, progression, regression)
```

```{python}
#| label: roc-curves

# ROC curves for all models, overlaid per classification task
```

## Feature Importance

```{python}
#| label: shap-analysis

# SHAP summary plots for the best-performing model
# Global feature importance ranking
# SHAP dependence plots for top features
```

```{python}
#| label: feature-importance-comparison

# Compare feature importance across the three group comparisons
# Which features are universally important vs. group-specific?
```

## Early Detection Results (NL → NL vs. NL → MCI)

```{python}
#| label: results-early-detection

# Classification report, confusion matrix
# Top discriminating features
```

## Disease Progression Results

```{python}
#| label: results-progression

# Results per progression path
# Comparison of feature profiles
```

## Disease Regression Results (MCI → MCI vs. MCI → NL)

```{python}
#| label: results-regression

# Classification report, confusion matrix
# Features associated with reversion to normal
```

## Biomarker Subanalysis Results

```{python}
#| label: results-biomarkers

# Performance with and without biomarkers
# Added predictive value of genetic/CSF features
```
